title: containernetworking-plugins security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1:1.7.1-3]
- Rebuild for new golang to address CVE-2025-61726
- Resolves: RHEL-146859

[1:1.7.1-2]
- rebuild for CVE-2025-22871
- Resolves: RHEL-90030
